effect: Each time this unit destroys an enemy rank with a Melee Attack, place 1 Order token on this card. For each Order token on this card gain the following:
1+: This unit's Attacks gain Sundering.
2+: Each time this unit performs a Melee Attack, before rolling Attack Die, the Defender becomes Panicked and suffers +1 Wound on a failed Panic Test.
At the start of each Round, target 1 enemy Combat unit.
While your opponent does not Control [SWORDS] that unit suffers -1 to Hit.
While that unit is within Short Range of The Tattered Prince's unit, it suffers -1 to Morale test rolls.
One friendly infantry unit in long range may perform a pivot or shift 2".

Each time this unit destroys a rank with a Melee Attack, place one Order Token on it. When performing a Melee Attack, before attack dice are rolled place 1 Condition Token on the defender for each Order Token on this unit. When attached to a Neutral Unit, it starts the game with 1 Order token.

When the Tattered Prince claims [SWORDS]: You may replace this zones effect with: *One friendly combat unit may perform a Charge Action, using its lowest Attack Die Value for the Attack. Each time this unit performs a Melee Attack, before rolling attack dice, place 1 Condition Token on the Defender, for each Order Token on this unit. If attached to a Neutral Unit, this unit starts the game with one Order Token.*

abilities.name: Ragged Raiment
effect: **Influence** *(When this unit Claims a zone, attach this card to a Combat Unit until the end of the Round)*:
Each time the Tattered Prince influences a unit choose 1 (if attached to a Neutral Unit, choose 2):
• This unit gains +1 attack die, when performing a melee attack.
• This unit gains +1 to Morale Test Rolls.
• This unit gains +1 Movement.

abilities.name: Wayward Commands
effect: When the Tattered Prince claims [MONEY] you may replace this zones effect with:
*One friendly combat unit may perform a Charge Action, using its lowest Attack Die Value for the Attack.*

fluff.quote: "I am the Tattered Prince, and I will have what was promised."

abilities.name: Pentos is mine!
effect: The Prince of Tatters beginns the Game with 2 Order Tokens. Each time this NCU claims a zone, you may spend an Order Token. If you do, replace that zone‘s effect with: *1 friendly combat unit performs 1 Melee Attack action*.

back_text.text: *Reduce this unit‘s cost by 1, if your Commander is from the Neutral Faction.*

fluff.quote: "I am the Tattered Prince, and I will have what was promised."

abilities.name: Controlled Chaos
effect: **Influence** *(When this unit Claims a zone, attach this card to a Combat Unit until the end of the Round)*:
While influencing a friendly unit enemies engaged with this unit suffer -1 to Hit.

abilities.name: Always Emerges on Top
effect: When your Commander is destroyed, you may destroy this NCU. If you do, place the "Prince of Tatters - Colorful Tactician" (1 point Neutral Attachment) in the first slot of a friendly Infantry unit, ignoring Attachment restrictions. The "Prince of Tatters - Colorful Tactician" becomes your Commander for all purposes. Tactics Cards that would target your former Commander instead target this unit.

fluff.quote: "I am the Tattered Prince, and I will have what was promised."
"War is a canvas — I merely add the color."

back_text.text: *The Tattered Prince counts towards attachment points as if it was an attachment of your faction.*

fluff.quote: "Blue and grey and purple, red and gold and green...The strips bloodstained...torn from the surcoats of men he has slain"

effect: Attach this card to that unit, until they fail a Panic Test.
While Attached this unit gains +1 to Morale test rolls. While you Control [MONEY], opponents cannot expend **Panicked** tokens on this unit while it is performing a Morale test.
If this is card is attached to the Tattered Prince's unit, this card is not removed when his unit fails a Panic Test.
Target 1 unengaged friendly unit, that unit performs a Maneuver Action.
If your opponent Controls [SWORDS], that unit may perform a Charge Action instead, using its Lowest Attack Die value.
If this targets the Tattered Prince's unit, it automatically counts as rolling a 6 on all Charge Distance Dice.

text.trigger: When a friendly unit performs a Charge Action, before rolling Charge Distance Die:
effect: This unit ignores the Hindering, Rough and Dangerous Keywords.
If your opponent Controls [HORSE], You may re-roll Charge Distance Die.
If this targets the Tattered Prince's unit, the Defender becomes **Vulnerable**.

text.trigger: When a friendly unit performs a Melee Attack, before rolling Attack Die:
effect: Choose 1. For each zone your opponent Controls among [SWORDS] or [MONEY], choose +1:
• This Attack gains +1 Attack Die.
• May re-roll any Attack Dice.
• This Attack gains **Vicious**.
